c={"\065\066\099\106\089\054\108\105\108\110\061\061";"\078\106\070\119\113\101\090\105","\066\117\086\079\057\102\048\098\112\054\053\061","\110\082\057\080\053\067\084\075";"\089\118\056\075\070\103\085\082";"\110\081\121\112\097\120\069\110\071\101\118\104";"\113\043\105\106\070\078\061\061","\097\083\067\120\097\083\050\107";"\108\090\067\106\074\101\113\121\108\056\099\048\074\048\050\043\052\103\111\061","\057\106\043\120\100\077\049\107\054\119\102\061";"\081\048\080\109";"\077\118\085\106\097\101\070\121","\066\097\108\056\107\099\053\079","\099\112\057\106\074\112\057\119\108\118\105\048\070\078\061\061";"\065\098\061\061","\111\069\101\057\049\084\112\113\071\115\061\061","\113\056\090\065\099\120\065\113\106\098\061\061";"\078\117\050\105\113\083\099\105\074\112\071\079\070\103\057\119";"\076\101\056\106\097\110\061\061";"\099\103\085\102\076\043\074\086\070\057\079\068\065\057\113\090";"\070\117\052\090\113\098\061\061","\078\112\085\111\076\117\102\107","\099\112\057\106\074\103\071\120\080\101\057\119\089\115\061\061";"\056\118\109\084\100\081\114\115\049\048\115\061","\074\107\050\114\077\074\079\102\070\090\120\071\077\118\102\112","\108\053\047\088\053\083\050\068","\087\102\115\047\122\068\050\115\065\087\113\061","\078\112\085\075\076\118\057\048\108\110\061\061";"\120\047\081\114\084\113\085\075\110\103\056\115";"\070\118\071\055\076\117\102\061";"\099\103\057\107\108\066\050\055\080\078\061\061";"\065\047\070\097\068\050\099\090\053\073\102\061","\072\078\061\061","\113\110\113\082\082\115\061\061";"\102\110\061\061","\119\068\108\111\083\098\061\061";"\078\117\050\105\113\083\099\105\057\103\056\068","\122\070\053\067\115\099\075\109\047\098\121\110";"\081\101\098\056\090\087\102\108\105\070\054\061","\072\051\109\086\069\116\078\047\047\078\074\052\097\104\117\043\111\075\104\102\054\119\070\107\089\052\109\051\090\047\090\118\117\116\049\056\066\078\061\061","\071\105\043\114\120\117\106\113\120\074\067\052\055\121\049\051","\114\088\090\120\ return(function(c,W,k,m,z,q,i,B,F,a,t,x,E,d,Y,V,j,e,r,D,y,h,o)D,j,o,h,e,B,r,F,E,V,Y,t,x,d,a,y=function(c,P)local W=y(P)local k=function(k)return r(c,{k},P,W)end return k end,function(c,P)local
